description.description: Details or purpose of the CloudFront origin access control, such as access policies or restrictions.

name.description: Specifies the name of the origin access control, must be unique within the AWS account.

origin_access_control_origin_type.description: Specifies the origin type for the origin access control, must be either 's3' or 'custom'.

signing_behavior.description: Determines how CloudFront signs requests, specifying whether to always sign, never sign, or inherit the behavior from the origin.

signing_protocol.description: Specifies the signing protocol to use for the CloudFront origin access control, such as Sigv4.
